ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shark_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the shark species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the shark species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the shark species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species and notable behaviors */,
  "average_size" TEXT /* Average size of the shark species in meters */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Typical diet of the shark species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Preferred habitat of the shark species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, vulnerable, least concern) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, safety official, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for public, 2 for researcher, 3 for safety official) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type (e.g., unprovoked, provoked) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "risk_level" INTEGER /* Risk level associated with the incident type (e.g., 1 for low, 2 for medium, 3 for high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the continent */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "coastline_length" TEXT /* Length of the country's coastline in kilometers */,
  "gdp_per_capita" TEXT /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "shark_risk_rating" INTEGER /* Overall shark risk rating for the country (e.g., 1 for low, 2 for medium, 3 for high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the country it belongs to */,
  "population_density" INTEGER /* Population density of the area in people per square kilometer */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality in the area (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "shark_sighting_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of shark sightings in the area (e.g., 1 for rare, 2 for occasional, 3 for frequent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., swimming, surfing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "risk_level" INTEGER /* Risk level associated with the activity (e.g., 1 for low, 2 for medium, 3 for high) */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the activity (e.g., 1 for low, 2 for medium, 3 for high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator/source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator or source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for follow-up */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization or institution the investigator belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the investigator (e.g., marine biology, shark behavior, etc.) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the investigator's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatalities" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fatality record */,
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the shark attack */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Name of the victim who died */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death (e.g., blood loss, shock) */,
  "rescue_attempts" TEXT /* Details of any rescue attempts (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  "rescue_time" TEXT /* Time taken for rescue to arrive */,
  "medical_treatment" TEXT /* Medical treatment provided (e.g., first aid, hospitalization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the injury record */,
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the shark attack */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, serious) */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received (e.g., stitches, bandages, hospitalization) */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  "long_term_effects" TEXT /* Any long-term effects of the injury (e.g., scars, disability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)
